author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit d06cb20. cargo xtask gen-completions: clap_complete (bash/zsh/fish/powershell) + clap_mangen (ripsed.1) into dist/, generated from the real Cli via a new minimal ripsed-cli lib target (#[path]-exposed args module, documented as build-tooling-only). Release workflow ships completions/ + man page in every artifact; CI gen-check added so Cli changes that break generation fail fast; dist/ gitignored. Verified locally: all four shells + man page generate, new flags (--multiline/--threads/--range etc) present in output. 25 suites green (lib target added 2), clippy/fmt clean.
